sections.sectionTitle: Topa in Israel A It Tawntungna

verses.text: Ta a neilo, a ciing mi aw, lungdamin la sa in. Nausuak natna a thuak ngeilo mi aw, la sa khia in la, a gingin kiko in! Bang hang hiam cih leh a kinusia numei' tate pen a kiten'pih numeite' tate sangin tamzaw ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Na bukmun khan' in la, na ten'na puanbukte kizalsak in. Cil bawl kei in. Na khaute sausak in la, na khetphimte khenkip in
Bang hang hiam cih leh taklam leh veilamah nangmah kizeelin, na suanlekhakte in minam dangte' leitang luah ding uh a, a kinusia khuapite mi tawh dimsak ding uh hi

Lau kei in, maizumna na thuak kei ding hi. Cihna ding theiloin om kei in; maizumin nang hong kikoihlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khangno lai-in na zulhtatna leh na meigon'na hangin hong kikonate na phawkkha nawn kei ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah hong Bawlpa pen nang-a' dingin na pasal bang hi ding a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi. Israel-te' Siangtho Pa pen nang hong honkhiapa hi a, amah pen leitung buppi' Pasian a kici hi
Khangno lai-a zineih a kima, kinusia-in a dah mahmah zi a kisamkik bangin Topa in nang hong samkik hi, na Pasian in ci hi
Tomno sung nang kong nusia pak a, ahih hangin hehpihna lianpi tawh nang kong lakik ding hi
Hehluatna hangin tomno sung nang kiang panin ka maitang ka seel a, ahih hangin tawntung itna tawh nang kong hehpih kik ding hi, nangmah a hong honkhia Topa in ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen kei-a' dingin Noah' hun mah tawh a kibang hi. Noah tuite leitungah hong pai nawnlo ding, ci-in ka kiciam mah bangin nang tungah heh nawnloin nang a hong tai nawnlo dingin ka kiciam hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mual liante kihemin, mual neute a kikhin zongin nang kiang panin ka itna kip paikhia ngeilo ding a, na nopsakna ding ka thuciamna kinlo ding hi, nang a hong hehpih Topa in ci hi.
“Gimna a thuak, huihpi' nawkgawp, hehnepna a ngahlo khuapi aw, en in, na suangte, suangvui hoih tawh ka ciang ding a, na bulpite suangmanpha tawh ka hih ding hi
Na khumdawnte suangmanpha tawh, na kulhkongpite suangsan tawh, na kulh khempeuh a manpha suang tawh ka bawl ding hi
“ Topa in na tapate khempeuh hoihtakin hilh ding a, na tapate daupai mahmah ding uh hi
Thuman leh thutang in nang hong thahatsak ding hi. Nenniamna tawh na kigamla ding a, nang na lau kei ding hi. Kihtakna tawh na kigamla ding a, nangma nai-ah tuate hong pailo ding hi
Mi khatpeuh in note tawh kidona a pian'sak leh tua pen keima kiang pan hilo hi. Note tawh kidona a piangsak peuhmah note' hangin puk ding uh hi
“En un, pum zapin ama kizatna ding ciatin a seek dingin hiam a bawl sikseekpa ka piangsak khin hi. A susia dingin a susia gawp theipa zong ka piangsak khin hi

Nangmah dona dingin a kibawl hiam peuhmah mavang lo ding a, thukhenna sungah na langah a pang mi khempeuh na nialgawpzo ding hi. Hih thu pen Topa' nasemte' gamhluah leh keima kiang panin amaute' dikna a kilahna ahi hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi.
